name: Multi-Benefit + Senior Health Mature Adult Small & Mini Dry Dog Food
description: Available exclusively from your veterinarian, Hill's Vet Essentials Multi-Benefit +Senior Health Mature Adult 7+ Small & Mini breed (<10kg) Dog Food with Chicken is a complete multi-benefit nutrition for mature adult dogs older than 7 years designed to support the aging brain and body. It provides a precise nutritional balance of energy, protein, vitamins and minerals. Not artificially preserved. No synthetic colours. No artificial flavours.
